Heart Vendors

Wordpress

Heart Vendors is my small vending machine business. I built it with Wordpress as to not reinvent the wheel.

Display Calculator

React

A visualization and sales tool for a display company. This is a calculator that allows you to visualize a display and estimate dimensions before ordering.

Visit Website

Yintii

Ruby on Rails

Inspired by TinyUrl, Yintii is a URL shortener so you can provide your friends, clients, and tweets with a sleek and short url.

Fang Gang

React

A website for FangGang, a Web3 brand and NFT collection on the Ethereum blockchain.

React Tug of War (Twitch Chat Game)

React Twitch

This is a tug of war game you can play on Twitch.tv - it is hooked up to the streamers chat feed, and viewers can say 'right' or 'r' and 'left' or 'l' to pull the flag a certain way.

Visit Website View on Github
